title: Helpers--Production Workers
description: Help production workers by performing duties requiring less skill. Duties include supplying or holding materials or tools, and cleaning work area and equipment.

tasks.text: Load and unload items from machines, conveyors, and conveyances.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate machinery used in the production process, or assist machine operators.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Place products in equipment or on work surfaces for further processing, inspecting, or wrapping.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Examine products to verify conformance to quality standards.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Start machines or equipment to begin production processes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Observe equipment operations so that malfunctions can be detected, and notify operators of any malfunctions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove products, machine attachments, or waste material from machines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Lift raw materials, finished products, and packed items, manually or using hoists.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Transfer finished products, raw materials, tools, or equipment between storage and work areas of plants and warehouses, by hand or using hand trucks or powered lift trucks.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Pack and store materials and products.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Help production workers by performing duties of lesser skill, such as supplying or holding materials or tools, or cleaning work areas and equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Count finished products to determine if product orders are complete.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Measure amounts of products, lengths of extruded articles, or weights of filled containers to ensure conformance to specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Separate products according to weight, grade, size, or composition of materials used to produce them.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Turn valves to regulate flow of liquids or air, to reverse machines, to start pumps, or to regulate equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Mark or tag identification on parts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Mix ingredients according to specified procedures or formulas.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Tie products in bundles for further processing or shipment, following prescribed procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record information, such as the number of products tested, meter readings, or dates and times of product production.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Read gauges or charts, and record data obtained.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Unclamp and hoist full reels from braiding, winding, or other fabricating machines, using power hoists.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Signal coworkers to direct them to move products during the production process.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Clean and lubricate equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare raw materials for processing.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform minor repairs to machines, such as replacing damaged or worn parts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Attach slings, ropes, or cables to objects such as pipes, hoses, or bundles.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Position spouts or chutes of storage bins so that containers can be filled.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Wash work areas, machines, equipment, vehicles, or products.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Break up defective products for reprocessing.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Cut or break flashing from materials or products.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
